summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of Emergence of New Kingdoms in socialscience.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 7 socialscience explains the core concepts of Emergence of New Kingdoms. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
